Por favor, confirme si su empresa o algu: Please confirm whether your company or any of its owners, directors, or officers has experienced any of the following situations:
cuentas bancarias estadounidenses existe: existing or denied U.S. bank accounts, tax or regulatory audits, legal actions, sanctions, asset seizures
o si alguna persona clave se considera u: or if any key person is considered a Politically Exposed Person (PEP).

Escriba la dirección en la que está regi: Enter the address where your company is registered.
Seleccione una opción a través de la cua: Select the option through which the company obtains most of its money.
Por favor explique brevemente el origen: Please briefly explain the origin of your funds
En un párrafo describa como la empresa o: In one paragraph, describe how the company earns money, for example: Sale of goods and services
Describa brevemente las actividades prin: Briefly describe your company's main activities
Describa en un párrafo los servicios o b: In one paragraph, describe the services or goods your company offers, for example: Sale of hardware materials and construction machinery.
¿La empresa gana dinero? Y si es así, ¿c: Does the company make money? And if so, do those earnings cover more than half of its expenses or only about 25%?
Seleccione la opción que se acerque más: Select the option closest to the percentage of expenses you cover with your income, for example: If your income covers 100% of your expenses, choose the first item; if your income covers only 25% of your expenses, choose the fourth item.
Seleccione el rango más cercano al monto: Select the range closest to the annual income your company earns
Años de experiencia de la Empresa: Years of experience of the company
Su empresa tiene sitio web o redes socia: Does your company have a website or social media?

A continuación debe seleccionar una de l: Below, select one of the options presented; if your company does not perform any of the mentioned activities, select the option: None of the above.
¿Opera o realiza transacciones en nombre: Do you operate or make transactions on behalf of accounts of clients, suppliers, contractors, or any other third party?
Seleccione si, sí su empresa alguna vez: Select yes if your company ever sends, receives, or holds funds that are not exclusively for the benefit of your own company (for example, processing payments for clients, paying external suppliers on behalf of clients, managing escrow deposits, or handling pooled accounts).
¿Su empresa cotiza en alguna bolsa de va: Is your company listed on any recognized stock exchange?
¿Cuál es el efectivo disponible actualme: What is your company's currently available cash?
Escriba el valor en dólares estimado que: Enter the estimated dollar amount you will send monthly
Número estimado de transacciones por mes: Estimated number of transactions per month
Díganos un estimado de cuantas veces al: Tell us an estimate of how many times per month you will make payments abroad
En este caso necesitamos que adjunte el: In this case, we need you to attach the official and valid permit or authorization from your country that allows you to carry out the activity you declared above
Por favor ingrese el enlace de su página: Please enter the link to your website or social media (Facebook, Instagram, etc.)
Si no posee sitio web ni redes sociales,: If you do not have a website or social media, please explain how you attract customers to your company.
Adjuntar una foto clara o el documento e: Attach a clear photo or scanned document of the valid commercial registration
Extractos bancarios (De los últimos 3 me: Bank statements (from the last 3 months, in the company's name)
Adjuntar el documento escaneado de un ex: Attach the scanned document of a clear and legible bank statement from the last 3 months of a company bank account
Adjunte 3 facturas, cotizaciones o contr: Attach 3 invoices, quotes, or contracts issued by your company to its clients
Debe subir 3 documentos que pueden ser f: You must upload 3 documents that may be invoices, quotes, or contracts for services or goods sold by your company to clients, matching the services or goods you declared as main activities.
Adjunte un comprobante de domicilio reci: Attach a recent proof of address: (water, electricity, or similar utility bill in the company's name)
En la factura debe verse el nombre de la:
The bill must show the company name, address, and NIT number; these must match the address, name, and NIT presented in the rest of the documentation.
If they do not match due to a rental or anticrético arrangement, the corresponding contract showing the property's address must be attached.
Estados financieros actualizados de la ú: Updated financial statements from the last completed fiscal year (most recent balance sheet and income statement); for sole proprietorships, Form 500, 605 financial statements
Debe ajduntar los estados financieros el: You must attach the financial statements prepared and signed by your accountant; you may also use national tax Form 500
Debe ser una fotografía clara sin reflej: It must be a clear photograph without glare, with all the ID document details easily readable.
EL REPRESENTANTE LEGAL ES UNO DE LOS SOC: THE LEGAL REPRESENTATIVE IS ONE OF THE PARTNERS REGISTERED ABOVE
